definitions: A basic, minimal HTML document structure that provides the essential framework for a web page, often including `<!DOCTYPE html>`, `<html>`, `<head>`, and `<body>` tags.
The foundational HTML code that serves as a container for dynamic content or further development, typically without much specific content itself.
examples: The developer started with an HTML shell.
We need to populate the HTML shell with content.
Every web page begins with an HTML shell.
